creator: davidhughes205@gmail.com
text:
When running the FreeBSD installer on my ASUS GL702ZC laptop I am running into an issue where the keyboard doesn't function correctly.

The following keys work:
Space bar
Return key
Numerical keys on numpad

Other keys do not work at all, or perform incorrect input, i.e. the 'i' key lists directory contents, 'd' key tends to function as escape key. Same result when using an external keyboard.

I have tried 11.3, 12.0 and 13.0-current images, and all have the same problem.
